description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named BuildPegasusRegularly that builds Pegasus and rdsn on multiple environments. The workflow triggers on push to .github/workflows/pegasus-regular-build.yml, manually with a workflow dispatch, and on a daily schedule at 2am UTC+8. Use a ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy across various OS and compiler family combinations, and perform steps to clone the Apache Pegasus source, unpack prebuilt third-parties, compile rdsn and Pegasus with GCC or Clang, and package the server.
